title: Create Brass & Beyond
description: This is a Create 6.0 NeoForge and additional mods.
body: **This is a Create 6.0 Modpack, which contains more than 70 additional mods for a better experience.** This pack is designed for players who love the creative engineering possibilities of the Create Mod and want to expand them even further. With carefully selected additions, it enhances automation, exploration, and performance without losing the vanilla charm. **Core Focus on Create:** Build intricate machines, transport systems, and factories with the full power of Create 6.0. **70 Complementary Mods:** From decorative building tools to improved world generation, every mod adds depth without feeling overwhelming. **Stunning World Generation with Terralith:** Explore breathtaking landscapes, unique biomes, and naturally integrated terrain perfect for your contraptions. ![Cave from Terralith](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cea1971c4a9df0a53b49248e1f37c33ec2007b6d.webp) **Optimized for Performance:** Tweaks and utility mods ensure smooth gameplay, even with complex contraptions. Whether you’re constructing massive automated farms, creating cinematic railways, or just experimenting with moving blocks in absurd ways, this modpack offers both stability and plenty of room for creativity! ![Automatic Crop Farm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9db72834aa10c9fb4dcac48f0665256d2cd3cd7.webp) ![Farmer’s Delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71a74cef3655a8c23a914124fd5e21f8d2bd9767.webp) If you find any issue you can report it here: [Issues Tracker](https://github.com/TheToicraft/Create-Brass-Beyond/issues/new)
